Subject: Expanding our partnership
Body: Very pleased with service quality. Looking to double our monthly orders. Can we discuss volume discounts?

Subject: Excellent service - increasing orders
Body: Your team has been outstanding. We are making you our primary supplier.

Subject: Product specifications do not match requirements
Body: The items received do not meet our specifications. This is not what we ordered based on the quote. We need to return these items.

Subject: Cancelling remaining orders
Body: Due to issues with initial orders, we are cancelling all pending orders. Please confirm cancellation.

Subject: Billing entity clarification needed
Body: There is confusion about which entity should be billed. We have multiple divisions ordering. Please clarify the billing structure.

Subject: Consolidate orders across divisions
Body: We need to consolidate orders from our various divisions for better pricing. Can we set up a master agreement?

Subject: No longer requiring your services
Body: We have found an alternative supplier. Thank you for your past service.

Subject: Account closure notification
Body: We have decided to close our account. Please process final invoices and confirm account closure.

Subject: Q4 volume increase
Body: Preparing for seasonal demand. Will need 3x normal volume for Q4. Please confirm capacity.

Subject: Invoice routing issues
Body: Invoices going to wrong entity. Ship-to and bill-to are different companies in our group. Please update.

Subject: Request for quotation
Body: Please provide quote for attached list. Need pricing and lead time.

Subject: Large volume order - special terms needed
Body: Placing order for 10,000 units. Need special pricing and extended payment terms for this volume.

Subject: URGENT EXPEDITE REQUEST
Body: Customer threatening to cancel $1M contract. MUST have delivery tomorrow. Authorize overtime/air freight.

Subject: Order status inquiry
Body: Can you provide status update on our recent order? Need ETA for planning.

Subject: Confirming delivery schedule
Body: Received order confirmation. Delivery date works perfectly. Appreciate the consistency.

Subject: Monthly standard order
Body: Please process our standard monthly order. Same as last month. Thanks!

Subject: Reducing order volumes
Body: Due to ongoing issues, reducing orders by 75%. Will source remainder from competitors.

Subject: Unacceptable service levels
Body: Quality and delivery issues continue despite multiple complaints. Reviewing alternative suppliers.
